item.title: philhaigh_: Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 2h Good couple of breaks at the end get Oli Lines past Ben Woollaston in a 10-8 epic. Liam High
item.description:
Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 2h Good couple of breaks at the end get Oli Lines past Ben Woollaston in a 10-8 epic. Liam Highfield awaits.
Here's your line-up for Judgement Days.
Tasty. 1 3 18 480

item.title: philhaigh_: Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 2h Still some decent ripples of applause being given out by the hardy souls/diehards/degenerate
item.description: Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 2h Still some decent ripples of applause being given out by the hardy souls/diehards/degenerates/perverts still gracing the EIS for this one deep into the night. 1 13 506

item.title: GWSnookerTips: George Weyham @GWSnookerTips · 3h #Winner Cita George Weyham @GWSnookerTips · 18h No bets on my snooker service today (
item.description:
George Weyham @GWSnookerTips · 3h #Winner Cita George Weyham @GWSnookerTips · 18h No bets on my snooker service today (hard to find any standout value) so I thought I would give you a free fancy which should go close….
Ben Woollaston/Oliver Lines Over 16.5 frames 10/11 Paddy Power/BetVictor
Good luck! 1 320
